name: asana-automation
description: Automate Asana tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): tasks, projects, sections, teams, workspaces. Always search tools first for current schemas.
capabilities: Create, search, list, and organize Asana tasks and subtasks
Manage Asana projects and sections with full CRUD operations
List and manage teams and workspace users
Perform bulk operations via parallel API requests
Resolve workspace and project names to GIDs for seamless integration
author: sickn33
securitySummary: This skill is purely documentation (SKILL.md) with no executable code. All 65 static findings are false positives: backticks are markdown code formatting, the URL is the legitimate public Rube MCP endpoint, and references to API operations are standard Asana functions not reconnaissance. Safe for publication.
valueStatement: This skill enables Claude Code to manage Asana tasks, projects, sections, teams, and workspaces through Composio's Rube MCP, eliminating manual API interactions and enabling bulk task automation.
limitations: Requires Rube MCP connection via Composio platform
OAuth authentication must be completed through Asana
Operations are scoped to user-authorized workspaces only
Parallel requests do not support transaction rollback on failure

useCases.title: Project manager automates recurring tasks
useCases.description: A project manager creates weekly status update tasks, recurring sprint planning tasks, and automates task assignments across team members in Asana.

useCases.title: Developer automates sprint workflows
useCases.description: A developer uses Claude to automatically create task templates for code reviews, bug tracking, and deployment checklists at sprint start.

useCases.title: Team automates bulk administrative tasks
useCases.description: A team lead performs bulk operations like moving multiple tasks to sections, creating project duplicates, or updating assignees across many tasks at once.

promptTemplates.title: Create a new task
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the asana-automation skill to create a new task named [TASK_NAME] in the [PROJECT_NAME] project. Set the assignee to [EMAIL] and due date to [DATE].
promptTemplates.scenario: Quick task creation with basic details

promptTemplates.title: List project tasks
promptTemplates.prompt: Using asana-automation, list all tasks in the [PROJECT_NAME] project. Show task names, assignees, and due dates.
promptTemplates.scenario: View all tasks in a specific project

promptTemplates.title: Create project with sections
promptTemplates.prompt: Use asana-automation to create a new project called [PROJECT_NAME] in workspace [WORKSPACE]. Add sections for [SECTION_1], [SECTION_2], and [SECTION_3].
promptTemplates.scenario: Set up a new project with organized sections

promptTemplates.title: Bulk create tasks
promptTemplates.prompt: Using asana-automation, create these tasks in bulk: [TASK_LIST]. Each task should be added to project [PROJECT_NAME] with the appropriate assignee.

bestPractices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get current tool schemas before use
Verify Asana connection status shows ACTIVE before running workflows
Use workspace GID resolution pattern to convert names to IDs for API calls
antiPatterns: Assuming tasks exist without checking - always verify task GIDs returned from creation calls
Skipping workspace GID resolution - most operations require workspace context
Not handling pagination for large result sets - check next_page in responses

faq.question: What is Rube MCP?
faq.answer: Rube MCP is Composio's Model Context Protocol server that provides integration with Asana and other services. It handles the OAuth flow and API communication.

faq.question: Do I need an Asana API key?
faq.answer: No. Rube MCP uses OAuth authentication. You connect your Asana account through the Rube interface, and it handles authentication automatically.

faq.question: Can I access any Asana workspace?
faq.answer: You can only access workspaces that you authorize during the OAuth connection process. The skill operates within your authorized permissions.

faq.question: How do I find workspace and project GIDs?
faq.answer: Use the ID resolution patterns in the skill: call ASANA_GET_MULTIPLE_WORKSPACES to find workspace GIDs, and ASANA_GET_WORKSPACE_PROJECTS to find project GIDs.

faq.question: What happens if a bulk operation partially fails?
faq.answer: Individual requests in parallel operations are independent. If one fails, others continue. There is no automatic rollback - you must handle failure recovery manually.

faq.question: Can I create recurring tasks?
faq.answer: The skill does not have native recurring task support. You would need to create tasks individually or use Asana's built-in recurrence feature separately.
